label: Wind Slab — Ridge Wind Loading    (Feb 3, sustained NW wind)
description: A post-storm ridge high establishes sustained NW winds of 55–70 km/h at Morrissey Ridge (Holfuy 1940). Cold temperatures (-18°C at ridge) keep snow dry and highly transportable. The system identifies active wind slab formation on SE-facing slopes — the primary access terrain for the study area.
